# Otito Ogene — Portfolio

> Python backend engineer specializing in AI agents, voice AI, and automation.

## Site

This is a Next.js 14 static portfolio site for Otito Ogene, deployed at https://otito.site.

- **Name:** Otito Ogene
- **Location:** Enugu, Nigeria
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/otitodev
- **Stack:** Python, FastAPI, TypeScript, Next.js, LangGraph, Claude API, Vapi, n8n

## Pages

- `/` — Home page with bio, skills, work experience, projects, and education.
- `/blog` — Blog listing page with summaries of all posts.
- `/blog/[slug]` — Individual blog post (MDX content).
- `/services` — Services offered (AI agents, voice AI, automation, MCP servers).
- `/contact` — Contact page with social links.

## Blog Posts

- [How Nigerian Businesses Can Automate Their Operations Using WhatsApp, n8n, and AI](/blog/whatsapp-automation-nigerian-businesses) — 2025-06-12
- [Building AI Voice Agents with n8n and CRM Integration: A Technical Guide](/blog/building-ai-voice-agents-n8n-crm-integration) — 2025-06-10
- [Setting Up n8n on AWS EC2: A Production-Ready Guide](/blog/setting-up-n8n-on-aws-ec2) — 2025-06-12
- [BridgePoint Weekly Operations Report: Automating Lead and Rental Tracking with n8n and Claude](/blog/bridgepoint-weekly-ops-report-n8n-claude) — 2025-07-01
- [BridgePoint Leasing Assistant: Building a Claude-Powered AI for Equipment Management](/blog/bridgepoint-leasing-assistant-claude-project) — 2025-07-01
- [Building Scalable Python Backends for AI Agents: Best Practices and Patterns](/blog/scalable-python-backends-ai-agents) — 2025-07-05
- [How I Built a Content Engine for a Fencing Company Using Zapier and Claude](/blog/fencing-content-engine-zapier) — 2025-07-03
- [Digital Health Triage: AI-Powered Patient Assessment for African Healthcare](/blog/digital-health-ai-triage-africa) — 2025-07-04

## Projects

- **ClaimGuard** — AI-driven health insurance claims processing system.
- **TriageAI** — Voice AI for patient intake and appointment booking (dental practices).
- **Whaply** — WhatsApp AI platform for multi-business AI agents.
- **Callahan Pipe & Drain MCP** — MCP server for emergency dispatch AI.
- **BridgePoint Leasing Assistant** — Claude-powered equipment leasing assistant.
- **BridgePoint Weekly Ops Report** — Automated reporting with n8n and Claude.

## Content Source

All site content is defined in `src/data/resume.tsx` (the DATA object). Blog posts live in `/content/` as MDX files.
